subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Praise be to God that, from the fragrances of the gardens of the Abhá Kingdom, that land is like unto musk and ambergris [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء الحمد لله از نفحات ریاض ملکوت ابهی آن کشور مانند مشک و عنبر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @exhortations and counsels, @unity; oneness of humanity
